files.test_contract.py:
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, records

PATH = '/schedules'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    records.clear()

def test_invalid_state_error_behavior():
    created = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'alpha'}).json()
    client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'archived'})
    assert client.patch(PATH + f"/{created['id']}", json={'status': 'active'}).status_code == 409

files.test_contract.py:
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from solution import app, records

PATH = '/messages'
client = TestClient(app)

def setup_function():
    records.clear()

def test_optional_field_handling():
    missing = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'alpha'}).json()
    explicit = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'beta', 'note': None}).json()
    supplied = client.post(PATH, json={'name': 'gamma', 'note': 'ok'}).json()
    assert [missing['note'], explicit['note'], supplied['note']] == [None, None, 'ok']
